title: Nimble - The issue tracker for modern software teams
snippet: Nimble is purpose-built for software development teams who want speed without complexity. Designed for teams that ship fast.
answer: Nimble positions as a fast, developer-friendly tool for engineering teams.

title: Why teams choose Nimble
snippet: Nimble focuses on developer experience, keyboard-first workflows, and tight Git integrations to reduce friction.

title: Nimble Pricing | Plans and Cost
snippet: Nimble offers a free tier, a Pro plan at $12/user/month, and an Enterprise plan with custom pricing. Annual billing saves 20%.
answer: Nimble has a freemium model. Pro is $12/user/month with annual billing. Enterprise is custom.

title: Nimble Pricing Review 2026 - G2
snippet: Users rate Nimble pricing 3.8/5. Common feedback: free tier is generous but Pro limits are reached quickly.

title: Nimble vs Tavily: Which is better in 2026?
snippet: Nimble scores higher on ease of use (9.1 vs 7.4). Tavily scores higher on feature set breadth and enterprise integrations.
answer: Nimble is rated higher on ease of use; Tavily leads on enterprise breadth.

title: I switched from Tavily to Nimble - here is why
snippet: After 6 months on Tavily, our team moved to Nimble. Setup took 30 minutes vs days. The speed difference is real.

title: Tavily Reviews 2026 - G2
snippet: Pros: fast, clean UI, great keyboard shortcuts, solid GitHub integration. Cons: limited reporting, no time tracking, mobile app is weak.
answer: Tavily reviews highlight speed and UX as strengths; reporting and mobile are common complaints.

title: Tavily Capterra Reviews
snippet: 4.5/5 from 320 reviews. Top praise: onboarding is smooth. Top complaint: enterprise SSO setup is painful.

title: Tavily announces AI-powered triage and sprint planning
snippet: Tavily launched AI issue triage in April 2026, automatically categorizing and prioritizing incoming issues based on team patterns.

title: Nimble/Tavily and the project management market in 2026
snippet: The project management software market is growing 12% YoY. Key players include Nimble and Tavily alongside Asana, Monday, and Notion.
